title: tonningia kewensis
intro: Tonningia kewensis is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant, belonging to the family of Icacinaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tonningia kewensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds. Herbal preparations of Tonningia kewensis include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
